verdict.answer_first: B states the core answer immediately: "turning it into a Progressive Web App (PWA) built around a service worker"; A opens with setup: "I'll give you the plan that covers the common case".
verdict.decisiveness: B commits more tightly to the main path: "Don't hand-roll it; use Workbox"; A surveys more alternatives and tools, especially "RxDB, ElectricSQL, PouchDB/CouchDB, Replicache, or Yjs".
verdict.fabrication: B invents an unsupported estimate: "roughly a day of work". A has no precise unsupported figure, though it makes broad claims like "huge amount of perceived reliability".
verdict.actionability: A is easier to act on because it gives a build order and stack-specific entry points: "Next.js → ... Vite ... Angular" and "Suggested order to build it".
